title: Pearl Enters the Fight
description: On pages 14–17, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: All you need is to hand over the ship to us and it'd be all over!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: took everything away from the owner...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just what the hell happened, Sanji?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's the name of the legendary sea.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You dumbhead, of course we know it.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's the ocean that we've all dreamed of.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: passenger ship's cook in training SANJ(9 years ago)

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And I'm going to search for that ocean and find it one day!

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
